social.quote2: Sunday used to be meal planning day. Now I just open my inbox.
social.quote3: My kids actually eat the meals. That's the real win.

howItWorks.title: Your week, handled.
howItWorks.subtitle: From "I have no idea" to "dinner's ready" in three steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us who's eating, what you like, what you can't have, and how much you want to spend. That's it. We never ask again.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Every week: a complete meal plan with recipes and a grocery list, ready before you even think about it.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Open the app. See what's for dinner. Cook it. No googling, no scrolling, no regret-ordering takeout.

preview.title: Here's your next Monday.

preview.groceryNote: Walk in, buy exactly this, walk out. No wandering, no forgetting, no overspending.

pricing.title: Less than one delivery order
pricing.subtitle: The average family spends $200+/month on unplanned takeout. This costs less than a single order.

faq.title: Still thinking about it?
faq.subtitle: Here's everything holding you back, addressed.
faq.a1: Tell us what you eat, what you avoid, and your budget. In 30 seconds, you get a 3-day meal plan with recipes and a grocery list. Free, no credit card. If it clicks, subscribe and we send you a full week, every week.
faq.q2: Is the free plan really free?
faq.a2: Completely. No credit card, no trial that auto-charges. You get a real 3-day plan with real recipes and a real grocery list. We think once you try it, you won't want to go back to winging it.
faq.q3: Can I customize for allergies and dietary restrictions?
faq.a3: Down to the ingredient. Vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, keto, nut allergies, shellfish, whatever it is. Every meal is built around it. Your plan won't just avoid things, it'll be good despite them.
faq.q4: What if I don't like the plan?
faq.a4: Hit regenerate. New plan, same preferences, zero guilt. You get 2 regenerations per week. We'd rather you love every meal than settle.
faq.a5: One click from your dashboard. No phone calls, no retention emails, no guilt trip. You keep access through the end of your billing period.
faq.q6: What kind of meals are included?
faq.a6: Real food you'd actually make. 15-minute weeknight dinners, weekend projects, breakfasts that aren't just cereal. Common ingredients you can find anywhere.
faq.q7: Is this just for one person?
faq.a7: Works for one, works for six. You set your household size and we adjust portions, grocery quantities, the whole plan. Couples, families, solo cooks, all covered.
